items.caption: A projector screen with a black frame and netting, designed for use with a projector. the screen is set up in a room with a beige wall and a window in the background. the text "the net return simulator series" is visible, suggesting that this is a product from that series. the screen is shown in a way that emphasizes its use with a projector, as indicated by the text "show with projector mount kit accessory (projector not included)."
